name: Gyros
recipeInstructions:
Mix ground lamb, water, lemon juice, salt, cumin, oregano, pepper, garlic, and onion. Form into 4 thin patties.
Cook patties in oil over medium heat, turning frequently until cooked through, about 10-12 minutes.
Split each pita bread halfway around the edge with a knife; separate to form pockets.
Place a patty in each pocket and top with lettuce.
Make the sauce by mixing yogurt, chopped mint, and sugar. Stir in cucumber. Spoon sauce onto lettuce and top with tomato.
505 calories (wrv)
